steps.name: Verify multiple build steps were created

parameters.name: expected
parameters.value: CreateBuildStepRequest(name='Autotest Build Step bda9177d', type='simpleRunner', properties=BuildStepProperties(property=[BuildStepProperty(name='script.content', value='echo This is the test 123'), BuildStepProperty(name='use.custom.script', value='true')]), disabled=None)

parameters.name: actual
parameters.value: BuildStepResponse(id='RUNNER_5', name='Autotest Build Step bda9177d', type='simpleRunner', disabled=None, properties=BuildStepProperties(property=[BuildStepProperty(name='script.content', value='echo This is the test 123'), BuildStepProperty(name='use.custom.script', value='true')]))

parameters.name: expected
parameters.value: CreateBuildStepRequest(name='Autotest Build Step b109685c', type='simpleRunner', properties=BuildStepProperties(property=[BuildStepProperty(name='script.content', value='echo Hello World!'), BuildStepProperty(name='use.custom.script', value='true')]), disabled=None)
